canonical_definition: A benchmark consisting of 2100 logical puzzles derived from SAT formulas, presented in natural language, used to evaluate models' ability to perform search-based logical reasoning and produce valid reasoning traces.
papers: NormGenesis: Multicultural Dialogue Generation via Exemplar-Guided Social Norm Modeling and Violation Recovery

definitions.paper: NormGenesis: Multicultural Dialogue Generation via Exemplar-Guided Social Norm Modeling and Violation Recovery
